summary: Verified footer social links bug fix. All 4 social icons present with correct data-testids. Twitter/Instagram/Facebook have exact target URLs, target=_blank, and rel='noopener noreferrer'. LinkedIn is intentional placeholder (href='#', no target). Confirmed clicking Twitter opens a new tab pointing at https://x.com/DropletClo80541.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer social links verified via Playwright: href/target/rel attributes correct; new-tab popup event confirmed for Twitter. LinkedIn intentionally placeholder.
rca of the issue: Original bug: anchors had no href/target. Fix (in Footer.jsx): SOCIALS array now has real URLs, and anchor conditionally applies target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' when href !== '#'. Verified working.
